**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Si'aoxin Electric Appliance Co., Ltd. is a legacy foreign-owned micro-enterprise established in 1994, originally manufacturing small household appliances (heaters, electric showers) under its former name 'Firebird Electric'. Despite a paid-in capital of 500,000 USD and a registered address in an industrial park ('No. 30, Electromechanical Engineering Zone'), its 2024 insured employee count of just 1 individual indicates that active manufacturing has completely ceased. The critical 'tell' is the inclusion of 'Own house leasing' at the very end of its business scope. This confirms that the foreign owner (represented by 'DAVID DENG') has shuttered the legacy production lines and transitioned the entity into a dormant shell, surviving solely by acting as a landlord leasing out its early-acquired industrial real estate/factory buildings.
